description: Make the supplied logo work in packaged desktop builds by generating a full Tauri icon asset set including macOS .icns and updating bundle config.
acceptance: Icon assets include macOS icns and standard png sizes generated from the supplied logo; tauri bundle config references the complete icon set; build/check pass.
verification: file icons; npm --workspace apps/desktop run build; npm run check

evidence.summary: Fixed logo delivery: sidebar brand now renders actual /vault-mark.png image with browser proof naturalWidth=128 naturalHeight=128 broken=false rendered=24x24; generated full Tauri icon set from supplied image including 32x32.png, 128x128.png, 128x128@2x.png, icon.png, icon.icns, icon.ico; tauri.conf references all icon assets; npm run check and npm run desktop:build pass; AppImage written.
